name: Fairway 54 Pleasant Grove
address: 452 W Center St suite 106, Pleasant Grove, UT 84062
about: Fairway 54 Pleasant Grove is an indoor golf simulator venue utilizing Golfzon technology. The facility features private bays equipped with advanced simulation systems that deliver realistic course conditions. Membership plans offer unlimited monthly access with varying reservation limits, and the venue is designed for both individual practice and corporate team activities. The simulator technology includes adaptive swing plates and auto-teeing systems to replicate real-course challenges and maintain gameplay flow.
why_golfers_like_it: Golfzon simulation technology provides unmatched accuracy and floor-moving realism
Adaptive swing plate simulates uphill, downhill, and sidehill lies for real-course training
Auto-teeing system minimizes setup time and maintains gameplay rhythm
Realistic hitting mats replicate fairway, rough, and sand conditions
24/7 access with unlimited monthly hours for dedicated practice

food_and_drink.notes: No information about on-site food service

simulator_hardware.notes: Advanced simulator technology with floor-moving realism and adaptive swing plate
